4203817488f64c8c929b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794373&x-signature=93%2BgFELEuezBpDzbqdLhPI0Fr64%3D","user_id":"734099458237412","user_name":"炸天帮～咸鱼王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"734099458237412","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7440135079294143550","book_info":{"abstract":"【沙雕搞笑】【第四天灾】【主神空间】【幕后流】
刚进主神空间，主神空间就炸了。
叶辰就这样成为了一名悲催的离线主神。
为了重铸荣光，他决定将把空间打造成虚拟游戏的样子。
收割那些被自己骗进来的玩家们，好修复空间。
不过，随着游戏越做越火爆，玩家越来越多。
空间的画风好像有些不太对劲儿了。
氪金玩家：二百万现金求带邪神团本，可预付定金，有实力的接。
魂游大佬：神魔战场来个吉祥物，嘴甜一点不抢装备的。
种田玩家：求购精灵古树种子，另外出售真灵药剂，要的私聊。
……
当空间彻底完全修复的那一天，所有人都在沙雕玩家们的脚下颤抖着。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6162130cf82731e022dd657c68a77d54","author":"墨月夜落","author_id":"","book_id":"7440135079294143550","book_name":"继承主神空间后，第四天灾出笼了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7440136692683522622","read_count":"17542","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"783323"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"366","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,网游,开局,搞笑轻松,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ad3130b6d69658bc262d7fe5c7b3d45d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453625&x-signature=S3DaczTWrqhpwH8MFpIdDZfCrc8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"59231698176","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"101"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323204024240ED3687D8B5EA03ABB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forward
